name: rest-node-api-mysql-jwt
description: This is documentatin for the Node API. For every request you must include in the header:  Content-Type: application/json  For protected routes by authorization we use JWT. Each of these have a lock by them. Must include a Bearer Token in the header  Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ...
